subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thank you for following up. It was great meeting you at the conference, and I'd be glad to get that formal meeting on the calendar.

Here are some available slots next week:

• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00 UTC

With respect to your request for direct contact details for our senior leadership, I'm not able to provide those at this time. Once we've had our initial discussion and identified concrete areas of mutual interest, I can help coordinate the appropriate next steps for senior-level engagement.

Please let me know which slot works best for you.

Best regards
